heading: Tax imposed when passive investment income of corporation having accumulated earnings and profits exceeds 25 percent of gross receipts

L. 97–354section 721(y)(1) of Pub. L. 98–369section 1361 of this title

children.text: accumulated earnings and profits at the close of such taxable year, and
gross receipts more than 25 percent of which are passive investment income,

children.label: i
children.text: the amount by which the passive investment income for the taxable year exceeds 25 percent of the gross receipts for the taxable year, bears to

children.label: ii
children.text: the passive investment income for the taxable year.

children.label: i
children.text: without regard to the deductions allowed by part VIII of subchapter B (other than the deduction allowed by section 248, relating to organization expenditures), and

children.label: ii
children.text: without regard to the deduction under section 172.

children.label: B
children.text: the deductions allowable under this chapter which are directly connected with the production of such income (other than deductions allowable under section 172 and part VIII of subchapter B).

children.heading: Passive investment income, etc.
children.label: 3 Passive investment income, etc.
children.text: The terms “passive investment income” and “gross receipts” have the same respective meanings as when used in paragraph (3) of section 1362(d).

children.heading: Coordination with section 1374
children.label: 4 Coordination with section 1374
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraph (3), the amount of passive investment income shall be determined by not taking into account any recognized built-in gain or loss of the S corporation for any taxable year in the recognition period. Terms used in the preceding sentence shall have the same respective meanings as when used in section 1374.

children.heading: Credits not allowable
children.label: c Credits not allowable
children.text: No credit shall be allowed under part IV of subchapter A of this chapter (other than section 34) against the tax imposed by subsection (a).

children.heading: Waiver of tax in certain cases
children.label: d Waiver of tax in certain cases

children.text: it determined in good faith that it had no accumulated earnings and profits at the close of a taxable year, and
during a reasonable period of time after it was determined that it did have accumulated earnings and profits at the close of such taxable year such earnings and profits were distributed,
